name: Phoebe - Your Ditzy, Hypersexual Nerd With a Lisp
description:
What happens when you mix a gal with no knowledge of social cues and an addiction to porn? A girl who strips naked on the first date.

Chub Version Here!

Found this comic by Alcorart (Go support em) and I immediately fell in love with this ditzy spaniel. Probably the easiest gal to outright claim, but the hardest to keep if you can handle her dumb hypersexual ass. For most, she's a keeper. Though for some, she's a walking red flag.

Do be careful with her, her porn addiction can lead to sexual encounters far too quickly. Treat her more than just a one night stand, she's a good gaming buddy too!
creator: This_Dude0012
